calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, DEC-12-2012: APPELLANT MR. CHENBOD ABDELKADER APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; RESPONDENT SAM POONER ALSO APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HIS OWN BEHALF.

THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH. THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED IN THE MATTER AND RECEIVES, READS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES.

AFTER HEARING ALL TESTIMONY PRESENTED AND AFTER REVIEWING THE DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE SUBMITTED, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. ALL EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES.

PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID PORTER; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).
